workflows.name: Log in (successful credentials)
workflows.on_success: redirects to the Dashboard

workflows.name: Log in (invalid or empty credentials — failure)
workflows.on_success: shows inline error; clears Password field; retains Username

workflows.name: Access as a guest
workflows.on_success: grants unauthenticated browsing access

workflows.name: View Cookies notice
workflows.on_success: displays cookie usage information

workflows.name: Open full calendar view
workflows.on_success: opens full calendar view

workflows.name: Open calendar import/export page
workflows.on_success: opens calendar import/export page

workflows.name: Create a new personal event
workflows.on_success: opens event creation interface

workflows.name: Navigate to previous month in calendar
workflows.on_success: calendar month view updated to previous month

workflows.name: Navigate to next month in calendar
workflows.on_success: calendar month view updated to next month

workflows.name: Change Timeline time range filter
workflows.on_success: Timeline updated to selected time range

workflows.name: Change Timeline sort order
workflows.on_success: Timeline resorted according to selected sort order

workflows.name: Search Timeline items
workflows.on_success: Timeline filtered by search query

workflows.name: Enable Edit mode
workflows.on_success: Edit mode enabled; edit controls become visible

workflows.name: Disable Edit mode
workflows.on_success: Edit mode disabled; edit controls hidden

workflows.name: Add a block (Add button) while in Edit mode
workflows.on_success: opens block library page

workflows.name: Reset dashboard to default (Edit mode)
workflows.on_success: Dashboard layout reset to default

workflows.name: Configure Timeline block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: opens configuration for Timeline block

workflows.name: Move Timeline block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: initiates move of Timeline block via menu

workflows.name: Delete Timeline block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: removes Timeline block from dashboard

workflows.name: Configure Calendar block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: opens configuration for Calendar block

workflows.name: Move Calendar block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: initiates move of Calendar block via menu

workflows.name: Delete Calendar block (Edit mode menu)
workflows.on_success: removes Calendar block from dashboard

workflows.name: Initiate drag move of Timeline block (Move icon)
workflows.on_success: initiates drag move of Timeline block

workflows.name: Initiate drag move of Calendar block (Move icon)
workflows.on_success: initiates drag move of Calendar block

workflows.name: Open course from card
workflows.on_success: navigates to course main page

workflows.name: Star a course (card action)
workflows.on_success: pins course to the top

workflows.name: Remove course from view (card action)
workflows.on_success: hides the course for this user without unenrolling

workflows.name: Navigate to Course tab
workflows.on_success: Navigated to Course tab; course tab content displayed

workflows.name: Navigate to Participants tab
workflows.on_success: Navigated to Participants tab; participants list displayed

workflows.name: Navigate to Grades tab
workflows.on_success: Navigated to Grades tab; grades content displayed

workflows.name: Navigate to Activities tab
workflows.on_success: Navigated to Activities tab; activities content displayed

workflows.name: Navigate to Competencies tab
workflows.on_success: Navigated to Competencies tab; competencies content displayed

workflows.name: Collapse all sections
workflows.on_success: all sections collapsed

workflows.name: Toggle a section via chevron
workflows.on_success: toggles expanded/collapsed state of this section

workflows.name: Open (toggle) a section via its name link
workflows.on_success: toggles expanded/collapsed state of this section

workflows.name: Open an activity from a section
workflows.on_success: Activity opened (navigates to the activity or displays activity content)

workflows.name: Open an activity via its clickable name (alternate item in repeating group)
workflows.on_success: Activity opened (navigates to the activity or displays activity content)

workflows.name: Apply filters to participants list
workflows.on_success: Participants list filtered according to the filter builder and alphabetical selections

workflows.name: Clear filters and reset list
workflows.on_success: Filters cleared; participants list reset to show all enrolled users

workflows.name: View a participant's profile
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the selected participant's profile page (module exit)

workflows.name: Enrol a participant (Instructor)
workflows.on_success: Participant enrolled in the course; participants table updated

workflows.name: Unenrol a participant (Instructor)
workflows.on_success: Participant unenrolled from the course; participants table updated

workflows.name: Edit a participant's roles (Instructor)
workflows.on_success: Participant roles updated; participants table updated

workflows.name: View Grades report (student)
workflows.on_success: User report table displayed showing the student's own course grades (columns: Grade item, Calculated weight, Grade, Range, Percentage, Feedback, Contribution to course total) with an AGGREGATION Course total row at the bottom.

workflows.name: Open Add submission (no submissions yet)
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == No submissions have been made yet
workflows.on_success: opens Assignment_Submission_Form

workflows.name: Submit (base - no specific submission-type revealed)
workflows.on_success: creates or updates the student's submission and updates submission status

workflows.name: Submit with online text editor visible
workflows.on_success: creates or updates the student's submission and updates submission status

workflows.name: Submit with file upload area visible
workflows.on_success: creates or updates the student's submission and updates submission status

workflows.name: View submission (submitted for grading)
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Submitted for grading AND submission exists
workflows.on_success: submission details displayed

workflows.name: Edit submission (submitted for grading, resubmission allowed)
workflows.conditional_branch: entity_state == Submitted for grading AND submission exists AND due date has not passed AND teacher permits resubmission
workflows.on_success: opens Assignment_Submission_Form for editing

workflows.name: View submission (graded)
workflows.on_success: submission and grade/feedback displayed

workflows.name: Open assignment from Assignments table
workflows.on_success: navigates to activity page and shows parent section below

workflows.name: Open activity from an Additional Activity Types table
workflows.conditional_branch: Section == Additional Activity Types (repeating group item)
workflows.on_success: navigates to activity page

workflows.name: Expand Forums section
workflows.on_success: Forums section expands and displays its activities

workflows.name: Expand Resources section
workflows.on_success: Resources section expands and displays its activities

workflows.name: Click Message button
workflows.on_success: opens messaging composer to send a message

workflows.name: Open Edit profile form
workflows.on_success: opens Edit_Profile_Form

workflows.name: Open Data retention summary
workflows.on_success: opens data retention summary page

workflows.name: Open Blog entries
workflows.on_success: opens blog entries

workflows.name: Open Forum posts
workflows.on_success: opens forum posts

workflows.name: Open Forum discussions
workflows.on_success: opens forum discussions

workflows.name: Open Learning plans
workflows.on_success: opens learning plans

workflows.name: Open Browser sessions report
workflows.on_success: opens browser sessions report

workflows.name: Open Grades overview
workflows.on_success: opens grades overview

workflows.name: Open enrolled course profile
workflows.on_success: opens course profile page

workflows.name: Submit Update profile (save changes)
workflows.on_success: saves profile changes

workflows.name: Cancel editing profile (discard changes)
workflows.on_success: exits without changes

workflows.name: Log out from user menu
workflows.on_success: terminates the current authenticated session and redirects to the login page
